mnv-protect-isro-a.summary: No new critical conjunctions introduced by the selected Protect ISRO maneuver.
assumptions: Round 1 secondary screening uses deterministic fixture results tied to the maneuver candidate.
Final-round screening should propagate the post-burn protected-object trajectory and re-run conjunction screening.

mnv-protect-isro-high-fuel-watch.summary: Maneuver clears the primary conjunction but creates a watch-level approach that needs dispatcher review.

concerns.reason: Large phase shift moves the protected asset closer to a secondary catalog object in the deterministic fixture.

assumptions: Fixture demonstrates why secondary screening is required even when primary Pc is reduced.

mnv-protect-isro-risk-demo.summary: Maneuver is blocked because it introduces a new critical conjunction with RISAT-2BR1.

concerns.reason: The post-maneuver path creates a new close approach below the critical miss-distance threshold.

assumptions: This is a deliberate negative fixture used to prove blocked secondary-risk behavior.
